title: Artists At Work
description: A portrait series photographing artists at work.

title: LunaFit Fresh
description: Brand and campaign design for LunaFit Fresh, built out across print and in-store display.

title: Sticker Portraits
description: Send your picture, and you will get a personalized portrait in the form of a sticker.

title: Beautiful Web Spring Wear
description: What if spiders ran a clothing store? Beautiful Webs is a clothing store for women that specializes on spring dresses made with soft vibrant silks.

title: Butterfly Garden Candy Shop
description: What if butterflies ran a candy store? Many sweet treats are shaped like flowers, since this is a store run by butterflies and they love the nectar from flowers.

title: Castillo Sampaguita
description: A casual restaurant for families, serving cuisine brought to the Philippines and back to Valencia — built around the feeling of being transported to the islands.

title: Social Cereal
description: Cereal Killer's is a cereal brand focused on mysterious and horror related themes — this time leaning cute, while keeping some darkness to it.

title: House Ghosts
description: A children's book telling the tale of Amelia, a curious girl who discovers mischievous yet protective ancestral spirits guarding her family's home.

title: Dance Perfumes
description: Two dance-inspired fragrances: “Flamenco Dancing Gypsy” and “Bolero Sensuous Step.”

title: Jessica Jung Author Website
description: A website design for author Jessica Jung.

title: XS Energy Drinks
description: An advertising and social campaign for XS Energy Drinks.

title: Couture Queens L.A. Fashion Festival
description: Branding, website and app design for the Couture Queens L.A. Fashion Festival.
